use_cases: Displaying and playing audio tracks in a music streaming interface
Embedding a podcast episode player with cover art and controls
Creating a music preview widget for audio marketplaces
Building a podcast or audiobook player card component
Adding background music playback to landing pages
ai_summary: A self-contained music player card component with audio playback capabilities powered by Howler.js. Features album artwork display, track metadata (title, artist), play/pause controls, progress bar with seeking functionality, and skip forward/backward navigation. Includes customizable main color theming and optional auto-play. Designed for media applications, music platforms, and creator tools requiring embedded audio playback.
